# Issue #6: Optimize Performance and Privacy

## Objective
Optimize the app for performance, battery life, and ensure complete privacy by removing any unnecessary operations.

## Requirements
1. Remove all:
   - Background operations (except audio)
   - Analytics code
   - Tracking
   - Network calls
2. Optimize:
   - App startup time
   - Memory usage
   - Battery consumption
   - APK size
3. Audit and remove unused permissions
4. Remove unused dependencies
5. Implement proper cleanup in onDestroy

## Success Criteria
- [ ] APK size under 5MB
- [ ] Cold start under 1 second
- [ ] No background processes except audio
- [ ] No network permissions required
- [ ] Battery usage metrics improved
- [ ] Memory usage reduced
- [ ] All unnecessary permissions removed
- [ ] Clean app profiler results

## Dependencies
All previous issues should be completed first

## Testing Guidelines
1. Profile app performance before/after
2. Measure APK size reduction
3. Test battery consumption
4. Verify no background processes
5. Check Android vitals
6. Run permission audit
7. Test on low-end devices
